notes: Four-piece Tier 16 (Winged Triumph) is the core of the set. Cap Hit and Expertise at 7.5%, then stack Haste. Capacitive Primal Diamond is the legendary meta gem from Wrathion's questline. Drops listed are 25 Heroic; Normal/Flex versions are the same items at lower item level. Draft compiled from Icy Veins MoP Classic guides.
